_comment: Skeleton patch input for share-public/python_scripts/patch_dbc.py. One criterion per achievement. Type 68 = ACHIEVEMENT_CRITERIA_TYPE_SCRIPT_EVENT. The asset_id encodes the bucket as continent_id * 100 + creature_type so the row is unique and human-readable, even though server-side completion is triggered directly via AchievementMgr::CompletedAchievement and does not consult this row at runtime.

entries.description_lang: Slay every Dragonkin entry in the Eastern Kingdoms.
Slay every Humanoid entry in the Eastern Kingdoms.
